title: Analysis of Low area Digital up/down clipping counter for digital In-memory counting
desc: Design and analyze a low-area digital up/down clipping counter optimized for in-memory computing applications.

title: Design and implementation of 16 Bit SAR ADC for high resolution
desc: Build a high-resolution SAR ADC capable of 16-bit accuracy leveraging advanced calibration and low-noise comparator.

title: Experimental Verification and Evaluation of Non-Stateful Logic Gates in Resistive RAM
desc: Verify functionality and performance of non-stateful logic gates implemented using Resistive RAM (ReRAM) technology.

title: Design and Implementation of High-Speed Carry Look-Ahead Decimal Adder (CLDA) Using CMOS
desc: Design a high-speed Carry Look-Ahead Decimal Adder (CLDA) using CMOS technology for enhanced arithmetic performance.

title: DESIGNING OF ARRAY MULTIPLIER BY USING MEMORY ELEMENT AND MEMRISTOR
desc: Create a low-power, high-density array multiplier integrating Memristor crossbar computing for in-memory multiply-accumulate.

title: Design of Approximate Adder With Reconfigurable Accuracy
desc: Design an approximate adder architecture allowing dynamic control over its accuracy to achieve optimal trade-off.

title: Design of Radix-8 Unsigned Bit Pair Recoding Algorithm-Based Floating-Point Multiplier for Neural Networks
desc: Design a high-performance floating-point multiplier based on Radix-8 Unsigned Bit Pair Recoding specifically optimized for neural networks.

title: Ternary Toward Binary: Circuit-Level Implementation of Ternary Logic Using Depletion-Mode and Conventional MOSFETs
desc: Design and implement ternary logic circuits at the transistor level using a combination of depletion-mode and conventional MOSFETs.

title: RISC-V CPU Design Using RRAM-CMOS Standard Cells
desc: Design a RISC-V CPU architecture using hybrid RRAM-CMOS standard cells to leverage non-volatile memory integration.

title: Operational Current Amplifier-Based Quadrature Oscillators Family
desc: Develop a systematic family of quadrature oscillator structures transforming voltage-mode, active-RC oscillator schemes.

title: Protecting Analog Circuits Using Switch Mode Time Domain Locking
desc: Lock analog circuit behavior by integrating a time-domain switching mechanism controlled by a key.

title: A High-Speed, Low-Power, High-Reliability and Fully Single Event Double Node Upset Tolerant Design for MRAM
desc: Enhance read/write access times, making the memory competitive in performance and highly tolerant to SEUs.

title: A 10-bit 50-MS/s Radiation Tolerant Split Coarse/Fine SAR ADC in 65-nm CMOS
desc: Radiation-Hardened by Design (RHBD): Incorporate robust architecture strategies to mitigate radiation-induced errors.

title: Performance Analysis of MAC Unit with Various Parallel Adders
desc: Evaluate performance of a multiply-accumulate (MAC) unit using different parallel adder architectures for speed/power tradeoffs.

title: Reliable Multistate RRAM Devices for Reconfigurable CAM and IMC Applications
desc: Integrate RRAM devices with MOS transistors to build a 4T2R array, enabling reconfigurable analog voltage-based CAM.

title: Deep Reinforcement Learning-Driven Secure ISAC Optimization Using STAR-RIS in 6G Networks
desc: Develop a DRL-based framework for optimizing secure multi-user ISAC systems with STAR-RIS, enhancing 6G communication.

title: AI-Synthesized Image Detection: Source Camera Fingerprinting to Discern the Authenticity of Digital Images
desc: Detect AI-generated facial images by extracting deep features using ResNet-101 and classifying them with an SVM.

title: Early Diagnosis of Alzheimer’s Disease Using Adaptive Neuro K-Means Clustering Technique
desc: Develop an efficient diagnostic model for early Alzheimer’s detection using AMSOM-FKM segmentation and PCA on MRI images.

title: A Resource-Efficient Time-Domain-Based Algorithm to Estimate Respiration Rate from Single-Lead ECG Signal
desc: Develop a computationally efficient time-domain MPD algorithm for accurate breath rate estimation from single-lead ECG.

title: Bandwidth Allocation and Power Control Optimization for Multi-UAVs Enabled 6G Network
desc: Develop an optimized algorithm for power control and bandwidth allocation in multi-UAV networks, enhancing energy efficiency.
